ns0:entry.ns0:title: BasedHardware/omi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BasedHardware/omi
Language: dart
AI wearables. Put it on, speak, transcribe, automatically

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Cateners/tiny_computer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Cateners/tiny_computer
Language: dart
Click-to-run debian 13 with desktop environment on android for Chinese users, with fcitx pinyin input method and some useful packages preinstalled. You don't need to install Termux.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: FoxSensei001/LoveIwara
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/FoxSensei001/LoveIwara
Language: dart
Love Iwara (i-iwara or 2i). An unofficial iwara flutter app - Supporting multiple platforms and devices including mobile phones, tablets and computers. Compatible with Android, Windows and other systems. 第三方的Iwara应用 - 支持多个平台和设备，包括手机、平板和计算机。兼容 安卓、IOS、Windows、MacOS等系统。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ImranR98/Obtainium
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ImranR98/Obtainium
Language: dart
Get Android app updates straight from the source.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: KRTirtho/spotube
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/KRTirtho/spotube
Language: dart
🎧 Open source music streaming app! Available for both desktop & mobile!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: KaringX/karing
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/KaringX/karing
Language: dart
Simple & Powerful proxy utility, Support routing rules for clash/sing-box

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Predidit/Kazumi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Predidit/Kazumi
Language: dart
基于自定义规则的番剧采集APP，支持流媒体在线观看，支持弹幕，支持实时超分辨率。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Solido/awesome-flutter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Solido/awesome-flutter
Language: dart
An awesome list that curates the best Flutter libraries, tools, tutorials, articles and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TheLastGimbus/GooglePhotosTakeoutHelper
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TheLastGimbus/GooglePhotosTakeoutHelper
Language: dart
Script that organizes the Google Takeout archive into one big chronological folder

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TomBursch/kitchenowl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TomBursch/kitchenowl
Language: dart
KitchenOwl is a self-hosted grocery list and recipe manager. The backend is made with Flask and the frontend with Flutter. Easily add items to your shopping list before you go shopping. You can also create recipes and add items based on what you want to cook.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bggRGjQaUbCoE/PiliPlus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bggRGjQaUbCoE/PiliPlus
Language: dart
PiliPlus

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ente-io/ente
Language: dart
💚 End-to-end encrypted cloud for everything.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: firebase/flutterfire
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/firebase/flutterfire
Language: dart
🔥 A collection of Firebase plugins for Flutter apps.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hiddify/hiddify-app
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hiddify/hiddify-app
Language: dart
Multi-platform auto-proxy client, supporting Sing-box, X-ray, TUIC, Hysteria, Reality, Trojan, SSH etc. It’s an open-source, secure and ad-free.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kodjodevf/mangayomi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kodjodevf/mangayomi
Language: dart
Free and open source application for reading manga, novels, and watching animes available on Android, iOS, macOS, Linux and Windows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: localsend/localsend
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/localsend/localsend
Language: dart

ns0:entry.ns0:title: miru-project/miru-app
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/miru-project/miru-app
Language: dart
🎉 A versatile application that is free, open-source, and supports extension sources for videos, comics, and novels, available on Android, Windows, and Web platforms.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: raoxwup/haka_comic
